content:
- [GHA_ERROR] `##[error]/usr/bin/tar: ../../../go/pkg/mod/sigs.k8s.io/kustomize/kyaml@v0.20.1/fn/framework/example/doc.go: Cannot open: File exists` (lines: L008076)
- [EXCEPTION] `Cannot open: File exists` (lines: L008076-L008575, repeated)
- [COMMAND] `/usr/bin/tar` (lines: L008076-L008575)
- [UNCERTAINTY] The error suggests tar is attempting to extract files that already exist in the Go module cache. The pattern is consistent across multiple Go dependencies (kustomize/kyaml, structured-merge-diff, coreos/go-oidc, bradleyfalzon/ghinstallation, googleapis packages, and others), indicating either a corrupted module cache or an issue with how the cache was prepared.
